creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: And later the solution involving flavors was abandoned and replaced by a restructuring of the ports. What used to be e2fsprogs-nobootfsck is now e2fsprogs-core, and the "bootfsck" support is in a new e2fsprogs package that creates package-build-time copies of the e2fsprogs-core files fsck_ext* and e2fsck.
